title: green totem
description:
This is my first texture pack. It changes the texture of the totem to resemble that of a leaf, transforming it into the leaf totem.




This alteration introduces a fresh visual aesthetic, imbuing the totem with the serene and natural appearance of a leaf,
body:
This is my first texture pack.
It changes the texture of the totem to the texture of the leaf totem.





This alteration introduces a fresh visual aesthetic, imbuing the totem with the serene and natural appearance of a leaf, creating a unique and immersive experience within the game environment.
